title: Valhelsia Structures
description: Adds new structures and dungeons to your world while being properly integrated.
body:
Valhelsia Structures is a mod that generates new structures such as abandoned buildings and dungeons, some vanilla structures are also reworked and replaced by our version. It also adds different blocks that could be very useful for the decoration of your home. Valhelsia Structures is built with Valhelsia Furniture.
The mod will receive new structures, blocks, mobs, bosses and features as updates are made.
Join us on our Discord server to get the latest news, changelog and to get support if you have any problems. We also have an extremely active chat channel and an image gallery submitted by members of the community.

Here are some structures that you will be able to find on your world. You can also find on screenshots some new blocks that are added with the structures, more screenshots are available in the images section.


New features will be added as updates are released, such as several types of structure variants to avoid running into the same ones all the time, new structures, new dungeons, new bosses and monsters.
